static void EnableAccurate ()

 Static Protected Attributes inherited from IncidentField
static bool NeedsAccurate = false
 Global toggle: request accurate/expensive integration path.
 

Detailed Description

Point electric dipole excitation.

The dipole is defined by its complex polarization vector \(\mathbf p\) and source position \(\mathbf r_0\).

In a homogeneous background, fields are obtained from the dyadic free‑space Green's functions. In a stratified background, reflected/transmitted contributions are added using tabulated layered‑media Green's dyadics.

Definition at line 34 of file Dipole.h.

Constructor & Destructor Documentation

◆ Dipole() [1/2]

Dipole::Dipole ( rvec location,
cvec polarization,
dcmplx vacuumWavelength,
dcmplx muMedium,
GreenF * fHom )

Construct a dipole in a homogeneous background.

Parameters
locationDipole position \(\mathbf r_0\).
polarizationComplex polarization vector \(\mathbf p\).
vacuumWavelengthFree‑space wavelength \(\lambda_0\).
muMediumRelative permeability of the background.
fHomHomogeneous Green function provider used for E/H and integrals.

The angular frequency is set to \(\omega = 2\pi c/\lambda_0\).

Definition at line 12 of file Dipole.cpp.

◆ Dipole() [2/2]

Dipole::Dipole ( rvec location,
cvec polarization,
dcmplx vacuumWavelength,
GreenF * fHom,
dcmplx muMedium,
std::vector< Grid > tabGrids,
GreenF * fLayered,
LayeredMediaUtils * utils )

Construct a dipole prepared for layered‑media calculations.

Parameters
locationDipole position \(\mathbf r_0\).
polarizationComplex polarization vector \(\mathbf p\).
vacuumWavelengthFree‑space wavelength \(\lambda_0\).
fHomHomogeneous Green function.
muMediumRelative permeability of the local layer.
tabGridsPrecomputed tabulation grids for layered kernels.
fLayeredLayered Green function for assembly.
utilsLayered‑media utilities (layer indices, k_z, Fresnel coeffs, etc.).

◆ EvaluateLayeredEandH()

std::vector< cvec > Dipole::EvaluateLayeredEandH ( rvec position)
virtual

Evaluate \((\mathbf E^{inc}, \mathbf H^{inc})\) in a stratified background.

Parameters
positionObservation point \(\mathbf r\).
Returns
Two‑element vector \(\{ \mathbf{E}, \mathbf{H} \}\) with complex 3‑vectors.
Exceptions
std::runtime_errorif layered Green's function for field evaluation was not set.
Note
If the observation and source points are in the same layer, the homogeneous contribution is added automatically; layered contributions are added on top.

Implements IncidentField.

Definition at line 47 of file Dipole.cpp.

dcmplx Dipole::IntegrateE ( RWGFun * f)
virtual

Integrate the electric‑field kernel against an RWG basis function (homogeneous).

Parameters
fRWG test function pointer (the triangle on which it lives defines the support).
Returns
Scalar complex contribution to the RHS of the final system.

Implements IncidentField.

◆ IntegrateLayeredEandH()

std::vector< dcmplx > Dipole::IntegrateLayeredEandH ( RWGFun * f)
virtual

Layered‑media counterparts of IntegrateE and IntegrateH.

Parameters
fRWG test function pointer.
Returns
Two complex scalars \(\{E^{inc}, H^{inc}\}\) combining direct and layered parts.

Implements IncidentField.

void Dipole::setGrnFunLayered ( GreenF * fGrnFields,
std::vector< Grid > tabGrids )
virtual

Provide the layered‑media Green's function for post‑processing fields.

Parameters
fGrnFieldsGreenF instance used to evaluate layered dyadics at points.
tabGridsGrids used by fGrnFields for interpolation.
Note
This does not modify the assembly‑time (grnFunLayered) object.

Implements IncidentField.
